mentions.note: Stock has big run; trim on Monday if concerned about Google backing out of potential deal. Better risk/reward after weakness.
Shorts have played havoc long-term; interesting level to buy now. Pull trigger moment company reports quarter; watch for YoY comparisons weakness to create opportunity.
Down from the mid-60s to the low-40s on inventory-reset and integration worries, but the company just closed an acquisition and could still add another 10 points.

FY25: 170% sales growth, $2.5B revenue, $620M EBITDA. PepsiCo portfolio (Celsius, Alani, Rockstar) scaling via distribution gains, expansion to mocktails/fizz-free, international (Australia F1, Spain). Down 20% on consumer weakness — buying opportunity.
